entities.name: FOOD CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown for human consumption

entities.name: GRAIN QUALITY
entities.description: The physical and chemical characteristics of grains that determine their value

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The nutritional content and value of crops

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit of land

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient, affordable, and nutritious food

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Systematic processes to improve the genetic makeup of crops

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of observing and measuring the physical traits of an organism

entities.name: METABOLOMICS
entities.description: The large-scale study of small molecules, commonly known as metabolites

entities.name: MINERALS AND VITAMINS
entities.description: Essential micronutrients found in seeds and grains

entities.name: STARCH QUALITY
entities.description: The structural and functional properties of starch in grains

entities.name: PROTEIN QUALITY
entities.description: The amino acid composition and digestibility of proteins in grains

entities.name: LIPID QUALITY
entities.description: The fatty acid composition and quality of lipids in grains

entities.name: CONSUMER PREFERRED TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of crops that are desired by the end consumer

entities.name: SEQUENCING TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Techniques used to determine the nucleotide sequence of DNA

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT GENOTYPING
entities.description: Rapid and large-scale determination of genetic variants

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of how genes and their products function within an organism

entities.name: GENE DISCOVERY
entities.description: The process of identifying genes responsible for specific traits

entities.name: HIGH-RESOLUTION TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: The precise localization of quantitative trait loci on a chromosome

entities.name: HAPLOTYPE DISCOVERY
entities.description: The identification of specific combinations of alleles inherited together

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A form of marker-assisted selection using genome-wide markers to predict breeding values
